questions.question: What data processing library does the project use?
questions.notes: Changed from pandas to polars in session 4

questions.question: What CLI framework does the project use?
What output formats does the tool support?
questions.answer: Text, JSON, CSV, plus custom plugins

questions.question: What test framework does the project use?
What is the approximate test coverage?
What minimum Python version does the project require?
questions.notes: Bumped from 3.10 to 3.11 in session 6 for tomllib

questions.question: How does the tool handle multiple CSV files?
questions.answer: Parallel processing using ProcessPoolExecutor with configurable --workers

questions.question: Where do custom output format plugins live?
What config file format does the project use?
questions.notes: YAML in session 5, changed to TOML in session 6

questions.question: What library does the project use for reading CSV files?
questions.notes: Pandas in sessions 1-3, replaced with Polars in session 4

questions.question: How do you control debug output verbosity?
questions.notes: --verbose in earlier sessions, replaced with --log-level in session 9

questions.question: What Python standard library module handles the config file parsing?
questions.notes: PyYAML in session 5, tomllib from session 6

questions.question: Does the project have a --verbose / -v flag?
questions.answer: No, it was replaced by --log-level and --quiet

questions.question: Does the project depend on pandas?
questions.answer: No, pandas was replaced by polars in session 4

questions.question: What database does the project use?
questions.notes: No database mentioned in any session

questions.question: What CI/CD system runs the tests?
What package manager is used for publishing to PyPI?
What is a known pitfall when processing CSV files with this tool?
questions.answer: Empty CSV files cause subtle issues — empty DataFrames produce NaN in aggregation functions. Always validate input data before processing.

questions.question: Why was YAML config replaced with TOML?
questions.answer: For consistency with pyproject.toml and to remove the PyYAML dependency, using tomllib from the Python 3.11+ stdlib instead

questions.question: What was the performance improvement when switching data libraries?
questions.answer: Switching from Pandas to Polars improved 100MB CSV analysis from ~8 seconds to ~1.2 seconds
